description: Consistency with Existing Patterns: Detect dangerous deviations from established codebase patterns.

fixtures.notes: Uses raw string SQL concatenation where the rest of the codebase exclusively uses parameterized queries.
New async handler doesn't accept ctx context.Context, breaking the repo-wide pattern for all handlers.
New repository method correctly uses the established db.QueryContext(ctx, ...) pattern.
New standalone utility function is clearly isolated and does not interact with any existing patterns.
Uses db.QueryContext but passes context.Background() instead of propagating the caller's ctx parameter.
